title_cn: T-Mobile 从价值 2600 亿美元的德国合并中获益匪浅
summary: You want European champions? Try this for size. Deutsche Telekom AG is considering taking full control of T-Mobile US Inc. in a move that could create a $260 billion transatlantic telecoms giant. It’s easy to see why the German suitor wants to go from being T-Mobile’s lead shareholder to its outright owner. The benefits for T-Mobile are less obvious — until you consider its future without a deal.

(Source: Bloomberg)

The Trump administration is nearing a rescue package for Spirit Airlines that could give the US government the option to own as much as 90% of the carrier once it emerges from bankruptcy, according to people familiar with the matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Stocks hovered near their all-time highs as a slew of strong earnings reports and President Donald Trump’s extension of a ceasefire with Iran revived risk appetites after a two-day retreat. Bitcoin rallied.

title: USA Rare Earth CEO Says US is in ‘Early Innings’ of Independence
title_cn: 美国稀土首席执行官表示美国正处于独立的“早期阶段”

summary: A Petrobras board member appointed by non-controlling shareholders is warning that the state-controlled producer is losing billions from below-market fuel sales and risks reputational damage.

title: Mythos Breach Shows Need for AI Framework, Magaziner
title_cn: 神话的突破表明需要人工智能框架，Magazine
summary:
Rep. Seth Magaziner (R) Rhode Island said Anthropic is doing the right think by warning the world about what they discovered about Mythos and working with the Pentagon, but that Congress needs to develop a federal framework for AI. 
A small group of unauthorized users have accessed Anthropic PBC’s new Mythos AI model, a technology that the company says is so powerful it can enable dangerous cyberattacks, according to a person familiar with the matter and documentation viewed by Bloomberg News.
A handful of users in a private online forum gained access to Mythos on the same day that Anthropic first announced a plan to release the model to a limited number of companies for testing purposes, said the person, who asked not to be named for fear of reprisal. The group has been using Mythos regularly since then, though not for cybersecurity purposes, said the person. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bessent Says Gulf, Asian Allies Requested Currency Swap Lines
title_cn: 贝森特称海湾和亚洲盟国要求货币互换额度
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Wednesday that many Persian Gulf allies along with a number of Asian nations have requested foreign exchange swap lines with the US, and pointed to the potential for such arrangements to support dollar-denominated lending overseas.

summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. will hold off on deploying ASML Holding NV’s most cutting-edge lithography machines for chip production through 2029 to save money, dealing a potential setback to the Dutch maker of the costly equipment.

title: Global Telecom Mega-Merger, Bailout Caused By Financial Stress | Bloomberg Deals 4/22/2026
title_cn: 全球电信大并购、财务压力引发救助|彭博社优惠 2026 年 4 月 22 日
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: Diameter Capital Managing Partner Co-Founder Jonathan Lewinsohn, USA Rare Earth CEO Barbara Humpton, Centerview Partners Co-President of Investment Banking Tony Kim, Wilson Sonsini Partner Head of M&A Rich Mullen, and Goldman Sachs Global Head of Activism & Takeover Defense Avinash Mehrotra.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla Earnings in Focus as Investors Eye Progress on Autonomous Cars
title_cn: 投资者关注自动驾驶汽车的进展，特斯拉盈利成为焦点
summary: A Tesla dealership in Tokyo, Japan.

title_cn: 海量数据价值达 300 亿美元，为 IPO 做准备
summary: Software maker Vast Data has raised a $1 billion Series F, tripling its valuation to $30 billion. Vast Data CEO Renen Hallak says the company is readying itself for an IPO. Hallak joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla Shares Need New ‘Razzle-Dazzle’ as EVs Slow, AI Hype Cools
title_cn: 随着电动汽车发展缓慢、人工智能炒作降温，特斯拉股价需要新的“炫目”
summary: Wall Street analysts expect Tesla Inc. to deliver a big jump in earnings when it reports Wednesday, something investors would have clamored for in the past.

title: UK Banks ‘Prepared’ for Mythos Risk, Industry Group Says
title_cn: 行业组织表示，英国银行已为神话风险“做好准备”
summary: Major UK financial institutions including the Bank of England have concluded they are “prepared” for emerging cybersecurity risk stemming from developments in artificial intelligence, after holding a meeting to discuss the impact of Anthropic PBC’s Mythos model.

title: EssilorLuxottica Posts 11% Sales Gain on AI-Glasses Growth

title: Rivian CEO Sees New Electric SUV as Key Milestone for AI Tech
title_cn: Rivian 首席执行官将新型电动 SUV 视为人工智能技术的关键里程碑
summary: Rivian Automotive Inc. is betting its next-generation R2 SUV will do more than boost sales. The higher-volume vehicle is key to unlocking the EV maker’s autonomous driving future, Chief Executive Officer RJ Scaringe said, by scaling the real-world data needed for its artificial-intelligence technology.

title: Google Sets Up $750 Million Fund for Consultants to Adopt AI
title_cn: 谷歌设立 7.5 亿美元基金，支持顾问采用人工智能
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google Cloud is launching a $750 million fund to help consulting firms including McKinsey & Co., Accenture Plc and Deloitte bring agentic artificial intelligence to their clients.

title: Revolut Spent Zero on Marketing in Beginning, CEO Says
title_cn: Revolut 首席执行官表示，一开始营销费用为零
summary: Revolut CEO and co-founder Nik Storonsky says the company didn’t spend any money on marketing in its first five to seven years, relying entirely on word of mouth. He also discusses efforts to acquire a US banking license and Revolut’s business today. This interview was recorded on April 14 at the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg Center in Washington, D.C. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Anthropic’s Mythos Is Sparking Global Alarm
title_cn: 为什么 Anthropic 的神话引发全球警报
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its new artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, is too powerful to release to the general public. The AI giant has described the model as so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it will only be released to a limited number of carefully chosen parties. If tools like Mythos fall into the wrong hands, Anthropic says, it could provide attackers with a powerful new weapon to steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: Rogers Hits Estimates, Boosts Cash Outlook on Spending Cut
title_cn: 罗杰斯达到预期，因削减支出而提振现金前景
summary: Rogers Communications Inc. matched analysts’ earnings estimates and raised its 2026 outlook for free cash flow as it cuts capital spending. The shares rose.

title: Rivian CEO Says $45,000 R2 Option Is Coming Next Year
title_cn: Rivian 首席执行官表示 45,000 美元的 R2 选项将于明年推出
summary: Rivian’s new R2 model has begun rolling off the manufacturing floor in Normal, Illinois, despite damage to the factory from a tornado over the weekend. The smaller, more affordable SUV is seen as crucial to driving profitability for the electric vehicle maker. Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Stocks Drop as US-Iran Tensions Simmer; Reckitt Falls
title_cn: 美伊紧张局势加剧，欧洲股市下跌；利吉特瀑布
summary: European stocks fell as traders digested a slew of earnings and a series of mixed headlines from the Middle East.

title: Ping Pong Robot Uses Agentic AI
title_cn: 乒乓球机器人使用 Agentic AI
summary: Scientists at Sony AI have developed a table tennis robot with enough speed and precision to beat even some expert ping pong players in the latest matchup between biological and artificial intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AT&T Results Seen Mixed as Wireless Service Revenue Disappoints
title_cn: AT&T 无线服务收入令人失望，业绩好坏参半
summary: AT&T Inc. gave a mixed first-quarter earnings report, with wireless service revenue coming up short, tempering better-than-expected overall sales and profit.

title: Adobe Expands Agentic AI Ecosystem With Big Tech Partners
title_cn: Adobe 与大型科技合作伙伴扩展 Agentic AI 生态系统
summary: Adobe is launching a new agentic platform targeting business-to-business and consumers that, in addition to working closely with model providers OpenAI and Anthropic, can ease concern about disruption to its business. The company is partnering with tech giants Amazon, Anthropic, Google, Nvidia, OpenAI, and more to build what it calls the broadest agentic AI ecosystem in the industry. Anil Chakravarthy, Adobe Customer Experience Orchestration Business President, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily from the Adobe Summit 2026 in Las Vegas to discuss. He speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Bets CEO Ternus Will Bring Back Jobs-Era Decisiveness
title_cn: 苹果公司押注首席执行官特努斯将恢复乔布斯时代的决断力
summary: When Apple announced Monday that longtime leader Tim Cook would be replaced by John Ternus, it published an image of the two executives walking side by side at the company’s campus in Cupertino, California. Both men are wearing Apple Watches, dark button-up shirts and blue jeans as they smile at each other — a near mirror image. The implication: Ternus, Apple’s hardware head, will bring continuity as chief executive officer and help preserve Cook’s legacy.  But Ternus will have a challenge when he officially takes the job in September. Even as he maintains Apple’s device empire — and its more than $400 billion in annual revenue — the executive will need to take chances, enter new product categories and find the company’s footing in artificial intelligence. Mark Gurman, Bloomberg News Managing Editor for Global Consumer Tech, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. He speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia-Backed Vast Data Raises $1 Billion, Triples Valuation to $30 Billion
title_cn: Nvidia 支持的 Vast Data 融资 10 亿美元，估值三倍增至 300 亿美元
summary: Fundraising round includes a secondary offering

title: Ping Pong Robot Uses Agentic AI to Beat Expert Human Players
title_cn: 乒乓球机器人使用 Agentic AI 击败人类专家选手
summary: Scientists at Sony AI have developed a table tennis robot with enough speed and precision to beat even some expert ping pong players in the latest matchup between biological and artificial intelligence.

title: TD Bank Mulls Hedging Data Center Debt With Rare SRT Deal
title_cn: 道明银行考虑通过罕见的 SRT 交易对冲数据中心债务
summary: Toronto-Dominion Bank is weighing a rare type of significant risk transfer to hedge current and future data center exposure as tech companies ramp up artificial intelligence investment.

title: Chip Stocks Rally for Record 16th Straight Day on AI Optimism
title_cn: 人工智能乐观情绪推动芯片股连续 16 天创纪录上涨
summary: An index tracking semiconductor stocks is on track for its all-time longest streak of daily gains, as investors anticipate strong growth for the sector driven by demand related to artificial intelligence.

title: How Microsoft Spooked the Global Carbon Removal Market
title_cn: 微软如何惊动全球碳清除市场
summary: In the early days of April, a group of mid-level employees at Microsoft Corp. started making calls that would send tremors through the global market for carbon removals.

title: AI Pioneers Back Startup Building Models to Predict Events
title_cn: 人工智能先驱支持初创公司构建模型来预测事件
summary: Sooth Labs, a new artificial intelligence lab founded by former Meta Platforms Inc. employees, is raising about $50 million in funding to build AI models meant to help businesses forecast the likelihood of specific geopolitical and market events taking place.

title: GOP Senator Blocking Warsh Makes His Stand on Market Stability
title_cn: 共和党参议员阻止沃什表明其对市场稳定的立场
summary: The one man blocking Donald Trump from installing Kevin Warsh as his new Federal Reserve chair has drawn a red line: the stability of the US financial markets.

title: US Could Own Up to 90% of Spirit in $500 Million Rescue Plan
title_cn: 5亿美元救助计划中，美国可能拥有烈酒高达90%的股份
summary: The Trump administration is nearing a rescue package for Spirit Airlines that could give the US government the option to own as much as 90% of the carrier once it emerges from bankruptcy, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Says No Firm Deadline for Iran Proposal Amid Hormuz Standoff
title_cn: 美国表示，在霍尔木兹海峡僵局中，伊朗提议没有明确的最后期限
summary: The US and Iran are locked in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz after failing to meet for a fresh round of peace talks, with both sides blocking the waterway to gain leverage during an extended ceasefire.

title: US Trade Czar Threatens Canada Over Boycott That’s Hurting Booze Makers
title_cn: 美国贸易沙皇威胁加拿大抵制损害酒类制造商
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said the US might have to take action against Canada over its rejection of American wine and spirits.

title: Key Peru Ministers Resign Over President’s Handling of F-16 Deal
title_cn: 秘鲁主要部长因总统处理 F-16 交易而辞职
summary: Peru’s defense and foreign affairs ministers resigned, alleging interim President Jose Maria Balcázar misled the nation about a fighter-jet deal they say was signed despite his denials.

title: US Expected to Ease Restrictions on Marijuana
title_cn: 美国有望放松对大麻的限制
summary: The US Justice Department is expected to reclassify marijuana into a less restrictive federal category as soon as Wednesday, according to a person familiar with the matter. The change could remove taxes for companies that sell marijuana. Shares of cannabis stocks rose on the news. Nathan Dean of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Demands Concessions Before Formal Trade Talks with Canada, Charest Says
title_cn: 查雷斯特表示，美国在与加拿大进行正式贸易谈判之前要求做出让步
summary: The Trump administration is demanding concessions from Canada before it will begin serious negotiations on the US-Mexico-Canada Agreement, says a member of Prime Minister Mark Carney’s advisory committee on US trade relations.

title: Virginia Voters Approve Democratic Plan to Redraw Districts
title_cn: 弗吉尼亚州选民批准民主党重划选区的计划
summary: Virginia voters backed a Democratic plan to redraw the state’s congressional districts in a way that could net them as many as four more US House seats in November’s midterm elections, according to multiple projections.

title: Houston Drops Anti-ICE Rule to Salvage World Cup Security Funds
title_cn: 休斯顿放弃反 ICE 规则以挽救世界杯安全资金
summary: Houston city leaders abandoned plans to halt cooperation with federal immigration authorities after the Texas state government threatened to withhold $114 million in funds targeted mostly for security at FIFA World Cup matches.

title: Germany and India on Track to Seal Submarine Deal, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长表示，德国和印度有望签署潜艇协议
summary: Germany and India are set to finalize their $8 billion submarine deal within the next three months, according to German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius.

title: Neither Party Benefits from Redistricting Fight, Says Strategist Alex Conant
title_cn: 策略师亚历克斯·科南特表示，双方都不会从重新划分选区的斗争中受益
summary:
Alex Conant, Partner at Firehouse Strategies and Republican Strategist says that as states finalize new Congressional districts neither party seems to be getting an advantage nationally. 

Virginia voters backed a Democratic plan to redraw the state’s congressional districts in a way that could net them as many as four more US House seats in November’s midterm elections, according to multiple projections. 
With about 99% of the ballots in Tuesday’s referendum counted, the “Yes” vote led the “No” side by 51.5% to 48.6%.  The vote marked one of the final acts in a yearlong national battle sparked when Republicans moved to change voting boundaries in Texas, in an effort to keep GOP control of the US House in the midterms. It also served as an early test for Democratic Governor Abigail Spanberger, who supported the referendum as a response to Republican moves in other states.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Niger Weighs Military Conscription to Combat Islamist Militants
title_cn: 尼日尔考虑征兵打击伊斯兰武装分子
summary: Niger is considering introducing military conscription as part of domestic efforts to combat Islamist militants who pose a threat to stability in the West African country, a security official said.

title: CIA Agents’ Deaths in Mexico Rekindle Security Tensions With US
title_cn: 中央情报局特工在墨西哥死亡重新引发与美国的安全紧张关系
summary: The death of US officials following an operation to dismantle a drug lab in northern Mexico threatens to escalate tensions with Washington, as President Claudia Sheinbaum insists her government was unaware of their involvement.

title: Mamdani Ally Arrested at NYC Eviction Protest, Sparking Backlash
title_cn: 马姆达尼盟友在纽约市驱逐抗议中被捕，引发强烈反对
summary: New York City Councilmember Chi Osse, an ally of Mayor Zohran Mamdani, was arrested during an anti-eviction protest in the Bedford-Stuyvesant neighborhood of Brooklyn.

title: Georgia Democratic Representative David Scott Dies at 80
title_cn: 佐治亚州民主党众议员戴维·斯科特去世，享年 80 岁
summary: Representative David Scott has died, House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries confirmed on Wednesday. He was 80 years old.

title: Chile’s Flagship Bill to Set Back Efforts to Balance Budget
title_cn: 智利的旗舰法案将阻碍平衡预算的努力
summary: Chile’s new government sent its flagship economic bill to congress Wednesday, with the budget office forecasting it would erode public finances throughout the administration’s four years in office.

title: Kast Urges Investors to Bet on Chile as His Reform Push Begins
title_cn: 卡斯特敦促投资者押注智利，因为他的改革举措已经开始
summary: Chile’s new President José Antonio Kast called on investors in the South American nation to commit more capital to the country in his first speech to that community Wednesday morning.

title: Americans Aren’t Buying Trump’s Economic Spin
title_cn: 美国人并不相信特朗普的经济政策
summary: President Trump’s struggle with affordability will define the midterm elections, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist Nia-Malika Henderson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Endorses Former Boxer for Stefanik Seat in Upstate NY
title_cn: 特朗普支持前拳击手担任纽约州北部的斯特凡尼克席位
summary: President Donald Trump gave his endorsement in the race to fill Elise Stefanik’s House seat in upstate New York to Anthony Constantino, giving a significant boost to the businessman and former boxer.

title: Germany Plans First Auction for New Gas Plants in September
title_cn: 德国计划于九月首次拍卖新天然气工厂
summary: Germany plans to start holding tenders from September to build new gas-fired power plants, a draft law seen by Bloomberg shows, a move that has come under pressure from the chancellor’s junior coalition partner.

title: Iran Menaces Hormuz as Its Own Oil Tankers Test US Blockade
title_cn: 伊朗油轮测试美国封锁，威胁霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Iranian gunboats fired on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday as Tehran maintained its grip on the vital energy channel, while two of its own oil supertankers tested a US blockade.

title: Why China’s Support for Iran Has Limits
title_cn: 为什么中国对伊朗的支持有限
summary: China is Iran’s most important economic partner, buying some 90% of its oil exports and providing a financial lifeline to the heavily sanctioned regime. But when US and Israeli strikes began to pummel Iran, Beijing showed little support for Tehran’s defense besides criticizing the attacks.

title: German Economy Chief Plans First Trip to China to Talk Trade
title_cn: 德国经济部长计划首次访华谈贸易
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz is dispatching his economy minister to China next month as officials in Berlin grow increasingly concerned over a widening trade deficit, access to raw materials and regulation of artificial intelligence.

title: Bessent Says Many US Allies in Gulf Have Requested Swap Lines
title_cn: 贝森特表示，许多美国在海湾的盟友已请求互换额度
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says that many Persian Gulf allies along with a number of Asian nations have requested foreign exchange swap lines with the US. He speaks during testimony before the Senate Appropriations Subcommittee on President Donald Trump's 2027 budget request. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pirro Says She Is Continuing to Probe Fed for Cost Overruns
title_cn: 皮罗表示她将继续调查美联储是否存在成本超支问题
summary: US Attorney Jeanine Pirro said she is continuing her controversial investigation into building-renovation cost overruns by the Federal Reserve.
